bugs.description: 13 A1 grammar worksheets had e1q1–e1q8 multiple-choice questions with no entries in window.EXPLANATIONS.
The .game-term element was hidden behind the sticky navigation bar on game play screen load.
slides.css .watch-out::before injected forbidden ⚠ (U+26A0) via CSS pseudo-element across all 201 slides pages.
window.GAME_DATA was completely missing — game rendered with no terms.

bugs.page: es/a1/vocabulary/* (6 index pages, 18 missing linked files)
bugs.description: ES/A1 vocab index pages linked to non-existent slides.html, flashcards.html and game.html (18 files total).
writing-grader.js section headers used forbidden symbols ✓, ⚠, ✎ in 'What is working well', 'Issues to address', 'Tips to improve'.
Worksheet had no window.EXPLANATIONS block — 6 questions gave no wrong-answer feedback.
Both worksheets had no window.EXPLANATIONS block — 6 questions each gave no wrong-answer feedback.
slides.css injected forbidden ✗ and ✓ via ::before pseudo-elements on .trap-wrong and .trap-right across all slides with common-mistake rows (adjectives, articles, present-simple, etc.).
Forbidden symbols (✗, ✓) used in panel-head green/red, result spans, DO/DON'T column heads, nav badge textContent, FCE mock feedback, button labels across 177 files.
window.ANSWERS, window.TOTAL_POINTS, and window.EXERCISE_TITLES were outside any <script> tag (raw text on page, not executed). Added missing window.EXPLANATIONS for 3 questions.

grammar.notes: 25 chapters — all clean after BUG-009/BUG-010 systemic fix

writing.notes: form-filling BUG-011 fixed; 2 textarea worksheets ok
